offer: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/week, inefficient inventory tracking causes stockouts and delayed shipments. We automate weekly inventory reports instead of manual inventory tracking spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient inventory tracking leading to stockouts and delayed shipments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Indie Hackers posts about inventory tracking issues
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
try_it: Let users try Weekly report generation and Inventory alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Provide default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing inventory data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
